board_csa_architect.notes: Clean ENUM + partial index. Orthogonal to REQ-L2-22 is_shadow_mode migration. North Star aligned (Activation Engineering).

board_ciso_cybersecurity.notes: No new attack surface. lifecycle_status inherits existing RLS. Activate endpoint guarded by privilegeGate admin. Audit logging included. No PII exposure.

board_caio_fullstack.notes: Zero VRAM impact - DB schema plus API only. No model interaction changes. Lifecycle guard is pre-dispatch. Migration is data-preserving.

board_vp_ops_devops.notes: Zero-downtime deploy - column is nullable with default. Simple rollback (DROP COLUMN plus DROP TYPE). Audit log provides observability.

board_red_team.notes: APPROVE WITH CONDITIONS: (1) Race condition - use UPDATE WHERE lifecycle_status=draft RETURNING for atomicity. (2) Bootstrap regression - create-org.ts must explicitly set active for Concierge and EA. (3) Draft flooding DoS - add max_draft_agents limit. Added 2 Anti-ACs to spec. STRIDE: Medium DoS risk mitigated by draft limit.
